name: Sartor Administradora General De Fondos Sa - Fondo de Inversion Sartor Renta Comercial
summary: Sartor Administradora General De Fondos Sa - Fondo de Inversion Sartor Renta Comercial is a commercial real estate income fund. It is managed by Sartor Administradora General De Fondos Sa and focuses on generating returns through investments in income-producing commercial real estate properties.
